overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, futuristic billboards, and crowded pedestrian areas. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality ray-traced lighting and vivid reflections on wet surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway beneath TENGU sign

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered walkway beneath a large TENGU sign, passing the massive ARASAKA billboard on the left

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'TENGU' text in pink and yellow neon
massive horizontal billboard displaying 'ARASAKA SOLDIER SYSTEMS' with a soldier image
yellow-lit overhead covering protecting the walkway from rain
black metal railing along the right edge overlooking a lower level
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered cyberpunk walkway at night, dominated by a large TENGU sign overhead and an enormous ARASAKA billboard on the left wall. The camera moves forward along the wet concrete path, passing sparse pedestrians walking in the opposite direction, while protected from the rain by the overhead covering.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food stall area with pawnshop

events.description: passing the end of the large ARASAKA billboard
approaching the food stall with bright green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past the ARASAKA billboard and approaching a busy food stall with green neon lights and customers seated at the counter

notable_agents.action: vendor working behind the counter of the green-lit noodle stall

entered.detail: open-air food stall with bright green neon lighting and customers seated on stools
illuminated sign reading 'PAWNSHOP' in white letters above a storefront
purple-lit vending machine against the left wall
large metal gate structure marking the exit to the open street

segments.scene_description: Moving past the ARASAKA billboard, the scene transitions to a more enclosed area featuring a bustling food stall bathed in green neon light. A PAWNSHOP sign glows on the right while the camera approaches a metal gate leading to the open street, with moderate crowds gathered around the food counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with neon reflections

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open rainy street with visible rain
pink and purple neon lights from the building become prominent on the wet ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the open rain-soaked plaza with colorful neon reflections dancing on the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: person holding a red glowing umbrella walking ahead in the rain

entered.detail: large building facade illuminated with vibrant pink and purple neon lights
wide open plaza with wet tiles reflecting the colorful neon lights
tall palm trees lining the center of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area into the open rain, the scene opens into a wide plaza where heavy rain creates shimmering reflections of pink and purple neon on the wet tiles. Palm trees line the center while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walk through the downpour alongside the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: colorfully lit pedestrian underpass with shifting lights

events.description: entering the intensely lit green and blue corridor with dramatic color shifts
lighting shifts from green to blue on the ceiling panels

agents.ego_description: walking through a futuristic corridor with dramatically colored green and blue lighting reflecting off the highly polished wet floor

entered.detail: ceiling panels emitting intense green and blue colored light
smooth curved wall with metallic finish on the left side
highly reflective floor surface mirroring the green and blue ceiling lights

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a striking covered corridor where the ceiling emits intense green and blue neon light that reflects vividly off the wet marble floor. The lighting shifts between colors as pedestrians walk through this futuristic underpass, creating a surreal atmosphere distinct from the open rain outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker commercial alley with digital billboards

events.description: exiting the colored corridor into a darker, narrower street section
passing by a large digital billboard on the left showing a woman's face

agents.ego_description: continuing through a darker, narrower street with large digital advertisements and fewer pedestrians, maintaining a steady walking pace

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying an advertisement with a woman's face
narrower street section with darker lighting and wet pavement
modern glass building facade on the right side of the alley

segments.scene_description: Exiting the vibrant corridor, the scene transitions to a darker, more enclosed alleyway with a large digital billboard on the left. The street is narrower and less crowded, with sparse pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while rain continues to fall on the wet concrete surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from sheltered walkways into an open neon plaza and finally into a narrow urban alley. It begins under a covered path dominated by a large TENGU sign and an Arasaka billboard, gliding past sparse pedestrians on wet concrete. As the camera moves forward, the space tightens around a bustling food stall bathed in green neon and a glowing pawnshop sign before passing through a metal gate. The scene then opens into a wide, rain-drenched plaza where pink and purple lights shimmer on wet tiles among palm trees and glowing umbrellas, before transitioning into a surreal corridor of intense green and blue ceiling lights reflecting off marble floors. Finally, the camera exits this vibrant underpass into a darker, narrower alleyway characterized by a large digital billboard and a quieter, rain-swept atmosphere.
